backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels) with user profile and diagram CRUD operations, using authorization mixins and access control for user-level permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: bidirectional arrow icon, text label rotation, free transform tool, text-based .exe icon, and text-based Excel icon, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including authentication, report management, attack path visualization with transform tools, MITRE technique selection, PDF generation, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a security-focused design palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Report Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing Internet Identity authentication, profile setup modal, and router configuration with protected routes for report and attack path pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component handling icon placement with resize, connection drawing, freehand/line/arrow drawing with movable elements, text labels with rotation/resize, free transform tool, and eraser functionality on white background.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG connector component rendering directional arrows between icons with hover effects and click handling for deletion.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders draggable icons for attack path diagrams, supporting both image-based icons (email, attacker, computer, server, etc.) and custom text/SVG-based icons (exe, csv, doc, bidirectional-arrow).
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a sidebar toolbar for attack path diagrams with draggable icon elements, drawing tools (freehand, line, arrow, text, eraser), and file operations (save, load, export, undo).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, login button, hero banner on homepage, and footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog component for loading saved attack path diagrams from backend, converting DiagramState format to frontend state (icons, connections, drawings, text labels) with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Logout button component that clears Internet Identity authentication and invalidates React Query cache when clicked.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with Internet Identity authentication, displaying Shield icon, app branding, and secure authentication messaging.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox component for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques with support for both predefined techniques from mitreAttackData and custom technique entries, displaying badges for selected items.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for a threat hunt report using the generateReportPdf utility, with loading state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup that prompts for name entry and saves it using the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook, with non-dismissible overlay.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing MITRE ATT&CK technique definitions organized by tactics (Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, Privilege Escalation) with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing state for attack path diagram editor including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, drawing tools, undo history, and element selection/transformation.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend actor, with proper loading state handling for actor dependency.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that retrieves the saved diagram state from the backend actor for attack path visualization.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient configuration with delegation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, save, delete) with a locally defined DetailedReport type. All backend methods are stubbed out and disabled since the backend no longer supports these operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Provides a React Query mutation hook to save the current user's profile via the actor's saveCallerUserProfile method, invalidating the currentUserProfile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: Provides a React Query mutation hook to save diagram state via the actor's saveDiagramState method, invalidating the diagramState query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart elements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Renders an interactive attack path diagram editor with toolbar, canvas, and save/load functionality. Manages icons, connections, drawings, and text labels with undo support and converts state to backend DiagramState format for persistence.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Provides a form page for creating new threat hunt reports, using ReportForm component and useSaveReport hook to submit data and navigate back on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single threat hunt report including executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings with PDF download capability.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: Displays a table of all threat hunting reports with columns for title, author, date, technique count, and IOC count, plus actions for viewing, downloading PDF, and deleting reports.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: TypeScript declaration file for jspdf library (content is empty in the provided snippet).
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates printable PDF reports from threat hunting data by opening a new window with styled HTML content including metadata, threat actors, MITRE ATT&CK techniques, IOCs, and findings sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, extended utilities for borders/shadows/animations, and typography/container plugins for the security-focused UI theme.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features for a MITRE ATT&CK-based threat hunting report portal, including report forms, technique selection, PDF generation, report listing, and custom styling requirements.
